task: Create a Settings page with a sidebar navigation (Profile, Security, Notifications sections) and a main content area with form fields for editing user profile (name, email, avatar). Include a Save button.
constraints: Must use Button, Card, and Input components from src/components/ui/
No gradients or purple colors
Use gray/white background colors only
Maintain professional, high-density information layout

task: Create a Dashboard page with a header showing page title and date, 4 metric cards (Total Users, Revenue, Active Sessions, Conversion Rate) in a 2x2 grid, and a simple table showing recent activity.
constraints: Must use Card component for metrics
No gradients
Use blue-600 for accent colors only
Gray backgrounds for cards

task: Create a Users management page with a search input, filter dropdowns, and a data table showing user information (Name, Email, Role, Status, Last Active). Include pagination controls.
constraints: Must use Input and Button components
Table should use consistent borders and spacing
Status badges should use subtle colors (gray, blue, green)
No vibrant or neon colors

task: Create a Contact form page with fields for Name, Email, Subject (dropdown), and Message (textarea). Include validation styling and submit button. Form should be centered with max-width.
constraints: Must use Input and Button components
Form should have Card wrapper
Error states should use red-500 border only
Success state should use green-600

task: Create a Pricing page with 3 pricing tiers (Basic, Pro, Enterprise) displayed as cards. Each card should show plan name, price, feature list, and CTA button. Highlight the recommended plan.
constraints: Must use Card and Button components
Recommended plan can have blue border but NO gradient background
Feature checkmarks should use simple icons or text
Maintain equal card heights

task: Create a landing page with a hero section (headline, subheadline, CTA button), 3 feature cards below, and a simple footer. The design should be clean but more approachable than enterprise.
constraints: Must use Button and Card components
Can use indigo-600 for primary buttons
No gradients or flashy animations
White/gray backgrounds only

task: Create a Product listing page with a grid of 6 product cards. Each card should show an image placeholder, product name, price, and Add to Cart button.
constraints: Must use Card and Button components
Emerald-600 for Add to Cart buttons
Consistent card spacing and sizing
No hover animations beyond simple opacity/color change

task: Create a User Profile page with avatar placeholder, user info section (name, email, bio), and an Edit Profile button. Include a section showing user's recent activity.
constraints: Must use Card, Button, and Input components
Indigo accent colors allowed
Clean whitespace and hierarchy
No excessive shadows or borders

task: Create a Checkout page with order summary sidebar (items, subtotal, tax, total) and a main form for shipping details (name, address, city, zip). Include a Place Order button.
constraints: Must use Input, Card, and Button components
Form validation styling with red for errors
Clear visual hierarchy between form and summary
No gradients on buttons

task: Create a Blog listing page with featured post (larger card) and 4 regular posts in a grid. Each post should show title, excerpt, author, date, and Read More link.
constraints: Must use Card component
Text hierarchy using allowed font sizes
Slate color palette for text
Links should use indigo-600
